creator: pl@catslair.org
text:
Hi gang,

Apologies for the possible inconvenience but I accidentally attached the
wrong patch file in my PR. I'm doing all this from my FreeBSD 10 test
environment as I write and was a bit too eager / hasty with my report.

And if that wasn't enough I hadn't properly configured SeaMonkey either
so it used my normal outgoing SMTP server. Therefor I sent this message
twice because bug-follow rightfully refused to accept my initial e-mail.

Alas...

Please find attached the /right/ patch file. It's almost the same as the
one previously attached but this time with the right file name and
containing the right path to the problem Python script.

Hope this can help.


Kind regards, Peter

--
.\\ S/MIME public key: http://www.catslair.org/pubkey.crt
    +- Sent from my FreeBSD 10 test environment.
